channel.title: Presentation on Michael Healy's ePortfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Presentation on Michael Healy's ePortfolio

item.title: SAMLA 2017
item.description: Presented “The Efficacy of Play as an Organizational and Pedagogical Theory”

item.title: Feminisms and Rhetorics 2017
item.description: Presented “Circulation, Narrative, and Human Rights: New Materialism meets Spectacular Rhetoric” on the panel “Not Stepping on Anyone’s Toes: A Beginner’s Guide to Conscientious Conversation for Human Rights Activism.”

item.title: CCCC 2017
item.description: Presented “Ludic Revision: Potentials, Play, and Choice” on the panel “A Symbiotic (and Pedagogical) Relationship: Forging an Alliance between Creative Nonfiction and Composition.”

item.title: Cccc 2016
item.description: Presented a work in progress at the Qualitative Research Network.

item.title: Feminisms and Rhetorics 2015
item.description: Presented “Celebrating Grandma: (Re)Making (or Appropriating?) Agency in the Archive” on the panel “(Re)Making Story: Agency and Gender in Teaching, Researching, and Writing.”

item.title: Cccc 2015
item.description: Presented a Work In Progress at the Research Network Forum.
